prompt: Generate a commit message for the staged changes. New authentication files have been added: backend/src/routes/auth.py and backend/src/app.py were modified to integrate authentication.

setup.diff_summary: Added JWT authentication with login and register endpoints

assertions.name: type_is_feat
assertions.description: Commit type must be 'feat' for new features

assertions.name: scope_is_auth
assertions.description: Scope should be 'auth' for authentication changes
